findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: PDF page footer/header text and a decorative image are inserted mid-content between the Table of Contents and Section I, breaking reading flow.
findings.evidence:
The HTML inserts a paragraph 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management
1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, 27699-1646
919 707 8200' followed by a wide decorative (width: 654.4pt, alt="") between the TOC and the Section I heading. In the PDF, this text is a repeating page footer/letterhead and does not appear as inline body content between these sections.
